info.name: NyaySetu Unified API Collection
info.description: Unified Postman collection for all NyaySetu API services (Spring Boot and Python Microservices).

item.description: Endpoints served by Spring Boot application (Default port 8080)

item.name: [GET] getMyOrders - Get all orders issued by the current judge

request.description: Get all orders issued by the current judge

Request body: { "docType": "affidavit|rti|complaint|notice", "petitionerName": "string", "petitionerAddress": "string", "respondentName": "string", "respondentAddress": "string", "caseDescription": "string", "incidentDate": "string", "reliefSought": "string", "courtName": "string (optional)", "departmentName": "string (RTI only)", "pioName": "string (RTI only)" }

body.raw:
{
  "docType": "complaint",
  "petitionerName": "Jane Doe",
  "petitionerAddress": "123 Lane, Mumbai",
  "respondentName": "John Respondent",
  "respondentAddress": "456 Street, Delhi",
  "caseDescription": "Bicycle theft from residential premises.",
  "incidentDate": "2026-06-01",
  "reliefSought": "Recovery of the stolen bicycle or equivalent compensation."
}

request.description: Generate a document and download as PDF.  POST /api/documents/generate/download  Same request body as /preview. Returns: PDF file as application/pdf with Content-Disposition: attachment

item.name: [POST] analyzeDocument - Upload and analyze a document with Vakil Friend AI. Features...

request.description: Upload and analyze a document with Vakil Friend AI. Features: - SHA-256 hash computation for integrity - AI analysis (validity, usefulness, type detection) - Automatic storage to Evidence Vault if important - Case Diary logging with cryptographic protection

item.name: [POST] analyzeDocumentForSession - Upload document for general analysis (not linked to a case)....

request.description: Upload document for general analysis (not linked to a case). Used during initial case filing via Vakil Friend.

request.description: Get all Vakil AI diary entries for a case. Each entry is protected with SHA-256 hash for integrity.

request.description: Verify integrity of a diary entry using SHA-256 hash.
